title: Universal Portals (Portals to anywhere)
description: Universal Portals adds 16 new colored portals to Minecraft. These portals can stand up (vertical) or lie down on the ground (horizontal).
body:
![Features](https://res.cloudinary.com/djregmuzg/image/upload/q_auto/f_auto/v1775601555/Zrzut_ekranu_2026-04-08_003907_yttvcy.png)

![instruction 1](https://res.cloudinary.com/djregmuzg/image/upload/q_auto/f_auto/v1775605224/Zrzut_ekranu_2026-04-08_013930_xbdkyo.png)

![instruction 2](https://res.cloudinary.com/djregmuzg/image/upload/q_auto/f_auto/v1775601219/Zrzut_ekranu_2026-04-08_003323_xzapne.png)

[![Universal Portals](https://res.cloudinary.com/djregmuzg/image/upload/q_auto/f_auto/v1775605698/Zrzut_ekranu_2026-04-05_213153_hxicpu.png)](https://erozeq.click/mods/mod?id=universal-portals)

![All items](https://res.cloudinary.com/djregmuzg/image/upload/q_auto/f_auto/v1776112907/all_items_pt3gal.png)


## FEATURES
- **Colors:** 16 different colors  
- **Orientation:** Vertical or horizontal  
- **Activation Keys:** Set portal color, ID, and exit name  
- **Universal Key:** Copy portal ID and change name  
- **Hub Function:** Connects 3+ portals, including different colors (toggle in config)  
- **Portal Bucket:** Create portals on the ground  
- **Colored Obsidian:** Blocks matching portal colors  
- **Cross-Color Linking:** Link portals of different colors for flexible teleportation  

---

## INSTRUCTIONS: HOW TO LINK PORTALS

1. Activate the portal using the magic flint  

2. Have two activation keys (any color)  
   - Right-click the portal → if you crafted an activation key, you'll receive two  
   - Do the same on the second portal  

3. To link a portal of a different color  
   - Craft an activation key of the new color  
   - Right-click the already activated portal (this copies its ID)  
   - Repeat step 2 on the second portal  

4. **HUB option (3+ portals per ID)**  
   - Enabled by default  
   - Can be disabled in the config  
   - Allows multiple portals to share a single ID  

5. When you enter a portal and wait a moment, a selection menu will appear  

6. Optional: teleportation can cost XP (config setting)  

---

## INSTRUCTIONS FOR A HORIZONTAL PORTAL

1. Pour an inactive portal using: `inactive portal bucket`  
2. The liquid must  
   - Fill the entire area  
   - Not spill outside  

3. The portal needs a frame made of any blocks on the ground  
   - (you can simply dig a hole)  

4. Ignite the portal using a magic flint  

5. Use an activation key (any color)  

6. Done — you have a portal  

---

## IMPORTANT
- To teleport between portals, the second portal must have the same ID
